data.description:
Consolidate the duplicated certification-case lifecycle shared by the three application-form models into a new intermediate abstract base class. Behavior-preserving. C1 of the C1+C5 refactor; C5 (status-constant cleanup) is a separate follow-up PR.

Full plan (vault): `Tech Specs/OSCER/application-form-lifecycle-refactor-plan.md`

## Origin
Surfaced by the 2026-06-29 refactor/fix scan; design agreed 2026-06-30. `ActivityReportApplicationForm`, `ExemptionApplicationForm`, and `DenialResponseApplicationForm` all subclass `Strata::ApplicationForm` + `include FormApprovalStatus`, then each re-implements a near-identical case-bound lifecycle: `case_not_closed`, `no_pending_forms`, `self.has_pending_form`, `flow_status`, `event_payload` (case_id merge), `self.find_by_certification_case_id`, and the two `validate ..., on: :create`. Only two things genuinely vary per model: the review-task class (already declared via `has_review_task`) and the case approval-status accessor.

## Design (agreed): layered abstract base class
`Strata::ApplicationForm` is `self.abstract_class = true` (NOT STI: each form has its own table, no `type` column), so an intermediate abstract class is safe and idiomatic (no STI footguns).

```
Strata::ApplicationForm                (abstract, Strata)
  -> CertificationCaseApplicationForm  (abstract, app)  shared case-bound lifecycle + include FormApprovalStatus
       -> ActivityReport / Exemption / DenialResponse ...Form   only unique fields + the two bindings
```

The per-model bindings become plain class-level declarations on each leaf (`has_review_task ...` + a `case_approval_status ...` declaration); the base enforces both are present via an `inherited`/init hook. `FormApprovalStatus` stays a concern the base `include`s.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] New `CertificationCaseApplicationForm < Strata::ApplicationForm` (`abstract_class = true`) holds the shared lifecycle (`case_not_closed`, `no_pending_forms`, `self.has_pending_form`, `flow_status`, `event_payload`, `self.find_by_certification_case_id`, the two `validate ..., on: :create`) and `include FormApprovalStatus`.
- [ ] Base enforces per-leaf bindings (review-task class + `case_approval_status` accessor) via an `inherited`/init hook that fails loudly if a leaf omits either.
- [ ] The three form models reparent under the base and delete their duplicated lifecycle methods, keeping only unique fields + the two bindings.
- [ ] No behavior change: the three existing `spec/models/*application_form_spec.rb` pass unchanged (regression net).
- [ ] New spec for the base: shared lifecycle behavior + a contract test that each leaf binds the right review-task class and approval accessor.
- [ ] Attribute resolution (`Strata::Attributes` / `Determinable` / `enum :status`) verified to resolve cleanly through two abstract layers.
- [ ] RuboCop clean; coverage stays >= 92% line / 70% branch.

## Out of scope (follow-up)
- **C5** (magic status values): replace bare-symbol queries with enum scopes (`.in_progress`, `<review_task>.completed`, `[:on_hold, :pending]` -> `.incomplete`). Separate PR after C1, scoped to the form models; leave the 7 `"approved"/"denied"` sites in `certification_case.rb` for a later pass.

## References
- Plan: `Tech Specs/OSCER/application-form-lifecycle-refactor-plan.md`
- Models: `app/models/activity_report_application_form.rb`, `app/models/exemption_application_form.rb`, `app/models/denial_response_application_form.rb`
- Concern: `app/models/concerns/form_approval_status.rb`
data.title: Consolidate application-form lifecycle into a CertificationCaseApplicationForm abstract base (C1)
